author: gary blendheim
review: Great property management services in Snohomish County, Melanies attention to detail and work ethic are stellar!

ownerResponse.text: Thank You Gary we love managing your property!

author: Brandon Moore
review: I highly recommend Melanie Maddy for your property management and real estate needs. Melanie is professional and is available to answer my many questions at all hours of the day. She has been simply amazing. Thank you!!

ownerResponse.text: Brandon Thank you so much its always a pleasure to add new investors and I hope you enjoy your new home just in time for the holidays!

author: Bryant Everett
review: Property is well taken care of and the move in process is very simple. They are very understanding of people just starting out or don't have a line of credit.

ownerResponse.text: Thank You Bryant we appreciate your review, Welcome to your new place!

author: Lori K
review: I met Melanie in the Spring of 2018 when I was considering renting my home.  She was highly experienced and helped me with all the aspects of getting my home ready to rent including advice on how to make a home attractive to quality renters

ownerResponse.text: Thank You Lori It was a pleasure working with you!

author: Raja Venugopal
review: I've known Melanie Maddy of Pacific NW Reality and Property Management Services for more than a year now. They manage multiple of my properties. Melanie's knowledge and experience in real estate and property management is extensive and

author: Nathalie Deng
review: Melanie is very helpful and she is very generous to give me a lot of advice and suggestions. she do things very efficently and she usually respond email very quickly. I really appreiated that she trying to help me to rent my property to the higher price in the market. I strongly recommond her as property manager. she is flexible too.

ownerResponse.text: Thank You Nathalie We appreciate your business!

author: Jennifer Daris
review: While renting a previous home, the owners switched realtors in the middle of our time to Pacific NW Property Management.  My husband and I respected their professionalism, helpfulness, communication, and overall business practices, and would go to them again if renting in the Snohomish, Washington, area.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much it was our pleasure!

author: Naomi Rodgers
review: My property manager Melanie has been great!

ownerResponse.text: Naomi Thank you for taking care of the property like its your own!
